## Meeting Purpose

[To define a new enablement program for scaling consistent, high-quality client delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Sprint Conversion Rate is Unsustainable:** The current 40% sprint conversion rate is a critical failure, worse than the pre-sprint model. The goal is to reach 85–90% by April.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=5837.0)
  - [**Standardize the Sprint Process:** The sprint must be standardized to codify expert judgment (e.g., George's) into a repeatable system. This includes deep discovery, stakeholder mapping, and client sign-off on context and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [**Shift Mindset to Strategic Partnership:** The team must act as strategic partners building a compounding engine, not as an agency delivering one-off outputs. This requires active curiosity and a focus on client outcomes.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=4603.0)
  - [**Implement Mandatory Checkpoints:** To enforce the new process, mandatory Loom-based checkpoints (e.g., for content strategy presentations) will be required for review by leadership (George, Kyle) before client delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=6947.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Inconsistent Execution & Unsustainable Sprint Conversion

  - [Current execution is inconsistent, relying on individual "heroes" instead of a scalable system.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [The sprint conversion rate is a critical failure at 40%, making the business model unsustainable.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=5837.0)
  - [The root cause is a process breakdown:](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=4504.0)
      - [**Ada's workaround:** Using Claude instead of the OS for speed, bypassing the system and creating non-reproducible work.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=4504.0)
      - [**Misaligned delegation:** Ada then delegates this non-standard work to others, creating a cascade of process failure.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=2820.0)

### The Solution: A Standardized Sprint Process & Strategic Mindset

  - [**Standardized Sprint Process:** Codify expert judgment into a repeatable system, making the process itself the product.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=4603.0)
    1.  [**Deep Discovery:** Uncover client goals, bottlenecks, and the "why" behind the engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
    2.  [**Stakeholder Mapping:** Identify all key decision-makers and influencers.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
    3.  [**Input Validation:** Play back findings to the client for confirmation and sign-off.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
    4.  [**Context Sign-off:** Create a big-picture context document and secure client approval.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
    5.  [**Persona Focus:** Select one primary persona for initial calibration.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)
    6.  [**Calibration Loop:** Use a "first shot" artifact to find failure modes and programmatically fix them by adjusting inputs (context, instructions, pipeline).](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=4641.0)
    7.  [**Bottleneck Identification:** Flag and help resolve client-side blockers (e.g., review processes) that prevent speed.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=5400.0)
    8.  [**Roadmap Communication:** Frame the strategy around the large-scale opportunity to create FOMO and shift the conversation from quality to speed.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=5506.0)
  - [**Strategic Mindset Shift:**](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=4603.0)
      - [**From Output → Engine:** Build a sustainable system that drives compounding growth, not just one-off pages.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=2495.0)
      - [**From Tactical → Strategic:** Act as a C-level partner, understanding the client's business and pain points.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=7959.0)
      - [**From Positive-Only → Transparent:** Honestly discuss what's working and what's not to build trust.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=7906.0)

### Implementation: Enablement Program & Checkpoints

  - [**Enablement Program:** Marisol will lead the program, starting with sprint team training.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
      - [**Content:** Organize all existing training materials (e.g., George's onboarding doc, Andi's Figma map).](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
      - [**Curriculum:** Structure a curriculum around the standardized sprint process.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=6906.0)
      - [**Assets:** Create new assets, including case studies (e.g., Lovable) and churn analyses to illustrate best/worst practices.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=3240.0)
  - [**Mandatory Checkpoints:** To enforce the new process, mandatory Loom-based checkpoints will be implemented.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=6947.0)
      - [**Requirement:** All client-facing deliverables (e.g., content strategy presentations) must be reviewed by leadership (George, Kyle) via Loom *before* being shared with the client.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=6947.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This ensures quality and process adherence, catching 90% of potential issues.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=6981.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marisol:**](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=8253.0)
      - [Create a Notion document outlining the proposed enablement program plan.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=6722.0)
      - [Deliver the plan outline to the team by tomorrow (Friday).](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=8335.0)
      - [Review key resources: George's onboarding doc, Andi's Figma map, the churn analysis retro, and George's 1.5-hour strategy whiteboarding video.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=5688.0)
  - [**Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=8335.0)
      - [Review Marisol's plan outline and provide feedback to ensure alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/bz2ZGi3p-g3dqdySsUTHGRrGVeZtPyGf?tab=summary&timestamp=8335.0)
